title: Gate Maintenance, Upgrades, Metrics, and Capstone · Failure Case: Template Variants
summary: Operate a reusable repository template without letting gates rot or overwhelm contributors. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates template variants increment in a reusable quality-gated repository template. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Offer risk-based language and project profiles instead of one universal template.
Raise standards gradually with changed-code gates and expiring debt records.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Build Template Variants evidence
steps.instruction: Append a gates-template-variants-2tobz6: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Template Variants into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
gates-template-variants-2tobz6:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]

steps.title: Defend the Template Variants model

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Offer risk-based language and project profiles instead of one universal template.
